languages.text: "Драйвстемы давно точили зуб на род Гапрак. Поверить не могу, что они решила свести счеты посреди войны!" {n}Себериан устало и очень по-человечески потирает органическую часть лица над переносицей.{/n} "Прошу, введите моего сенешаля в курс дела. Вопрос деликатный: леди Драйвстем совершила измену и не может уйти безнаказанной, но без подкрепления Гапраков я могу рассчитывать лишь на ее войска. Пускай она решит судьбу Камиллы — это станет для Ларии неплохим уроком в политических интригах".

traits.locale_text: "Драйвстемы давно точили зуб на род Гапрак. Поверить не могу, что они решила свести счеты посреди войны!" {n}Себериан устало и очень по-человечески потирает органическую часть лица над переносицей.{/n} "Прошу, введите моего сенешаля в курс дела. Вопрос деликатный: леди Драйвстем совершила измену и не может уйти безнаказанной, но без подкрепления Гапраков я могу рассчитывать лишь на ее войска. Пускай она решит судьбу Камиллы — это станет для Ларии неплохим уроком в политических интригах".

languages.text: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."

The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."

languages.text: "Die Drivestems hegen schon seit langer Zeit einen Groll gegen die Gaprak. Ich kann nicht glauben, dass sie mitten in einem Krieg alte Rechnungen begleichen!" {n}Seberian reibt sich mit einer sehr menschlichen Geste müde den organischen Teil seines Gesichtes über seinem Nasenrücken.{/n} "Bitte informiert meine Truchsessin. Die Angelegenheit ist delikat: Lady Drivestem ist eine Verräterin und muss bestraft werden, aber ohne die Gaprak-Verstärkungen bleiben mir nur die Truppen der Drivestems, auf dich ich mich verlassen kann. Lasst meine Truchsessin über Camillas Schicksal befinden ... das ist für Laria eine gute Lektion, was politisches Taktieren angeht."
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."

Die Angelegenheit ist delikat: Lady Drivestem ist eine Verräterin und muss bestraft werden, aber ohne die Gaprak-Verstärkungen bleiben mir nur die Truppen der Drivestems, auf dich ich mich verlassen kann. Lasst meine Truchsessin über Camillas Schicksal befinden ... das ist für Laria eine gute Lektion, was politisches Taktieren angeht.

languages.text: “德莱夫斯塔家和贾帕克家积怨已久。我真不敢相信，他们居然会选择在战争时期清算旧怨！”{n}塞贝里安疲惫地揉了揉鼻梁上方那仅存的血肉部分，这动作意外地极具人性意味。{/n}“请把情况告知我的总领。这件事非常棘手：德莱夫斯塔夫人犯了叛国罪，不能不罚，但没了贾帕克家族的援军，我只能依靠德莱夫斯塔家族的部队了。让我的总领来决定卡米拉的命运吧——这对菈丽雅来说，会是一堂很好的政治权谋课。”
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."

languages.text: « Les Drivestem nourrissent une vieille rancœur à l'encontre des Gaprak. Et il a fallu qu'ils choisissent de régler leurs comptes en pleine guerre ! » {n}Seberian frotte la partie organique de son visage, au-dessus de son nez, en un geste très humain.{/n} « Veuillez en informer ma sénéchale. La situation est délicate : dame Drivestem s'est rendue coupable de trahison et doit être châtiée, mais sans les renforts des Gaprak, les troupes de la maison Drivestem sont mon unique soutien. Que la sénéchale décide du sort de Camilla. Ce sera une bonne leçon de politique pour Laria. »
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."

traits.locale_text: « Les Drivestem nourrissent une vieille rancœur à l'encontre des Gaprak. Et il a fallu qu'ils choisissent de régler leurs comptes en pleine guerre ! » {n}Seberian frotte la partie organique de son visage, au-dessus de son nez, en un geste très humain.{/n} « Veuillez en informer ma sénéchale. La situation est délicate : dame Drivestem s'est rendue coupable de trahison et doit être châtiée, mais sans les renforts des Gaprak, les troupes de la maison Drivestem sont mon unique soutien. Que la sénéchale décide du sort de Camilla. Ce sera une bonne leçon de politique pour Laria. »

languages.text: «Los Drivestem han tenido rencillas con los Gaprak durante mucho tiempo. ¡Me resulta inverosímil que hayan decidido saldar cuentas en mitad de una guerra!». {n}Seberian se frota la parte orgánica del rostro, justo por encima del puente de la nariz, en un gesto de cansancio muy humano.{/n} «Por favor, informe a mi senescal de los hechos. Se trata de un asunto delicado: lady Drivestem ha cometido traición y eso no puede quedar sin castigo, pero sin los refuerzos de los Gaprak, no me quedan más tropas que las leales a los Drivestem. Dejaré el destino de Camilla en manos de mi senescal; será una buena lección sobre tejemanejes políticos para Laria».
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."

Se trata de un asunto delicado: lady Drivestem ha cometido traición y eso no puede quedar sin castigo, pero sin los refuerzos de los Gaprak, no me quedan más tropas que las leales a los Drivestem. Dejaré el destino de Camilla en manos de mi senescal; será una buena lección sobre tejemanejes políticos para Laria».

languages.text: "Drivestemler, Gapraklara karşı uzun süredir kin besliyor. Savaşın ortasında hesaplaşmayı seçeceklerine inanamıyorum!" {n}Seberian, yorgunlukla çok insani bir jestle burnunun köprüsünün üzerindeki yüzünün organik kısmını ovuşturuyor.{/n} "Seneşalimi gerçeklerden haberdar et. Mesele hassas... Leydi Drivestem bize ihanet etti ve bu cezasız kalamaz. Ancak Gaprak takviyeleri olmadan güvenebileceğim bir tek Drivestem birlikleri var. Camilla'nın kaderine Seneşalim karar versin. Laria'ya da siyasi manevra konusunda iyi bir ders olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."

Mesele hassas... Leydi Drivestem bize ihanet etti ve bu cezasız kalamaz. Ancak Gaprak takviyeleri olmadan güvenebileceğim bir tek Drivestem birlikleri var. Camilla'nın kaderine Seneşalim karar versin. Laria'ya da siyasi manevra konusunda iyi bir ders olacaktır."

languages.text: 「ドライブステム家は長年、ギャプラク家と因縁を続けてきた。戦争の最中に因縁を晴らすとは信じがたい！」{n}シベリアは鼻筋の上の有機部分を指で擦り、人間らしい仕草を見せる。{/n}「私の執事には事実を伝えてください。この件はデリケートです。ドライブステム女爵は裏切り行為を犯し、罰せられなければなりません。しかしギャプラク家の増援がなければ、ドライブステム家の兵しか頼るものはありません。私の執事には、カミラ女爵の運命を決めさせてください。これはリアリアにとって政治的駆け引きのよい教訓になるでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "The Drivestems have been nursing a grudge against the Gapraks for a long time. I cannot believe they would choose to settle scores in the middle of a war!" {n}Seberian wearily rubs the organic part of his face above the bridge of his nose in a very human gesture.{/n} "Please make my Seneschal aware of the facts. The matter is delicate: Lady Drivestem has committed treason and cannot go unpunished, but without the Gaprak reinforcements, I have only Drivestem troops to rely on. Let my Seneschal decide Camilla's fate — it will be a good lesson in political manoeuvring for Laria."
